item.title: Understanding Car Payments
item.description: A simple breakdown of how car payments are calculated, including financing terms, interest, and monthly costs. What should buyers pay attention to before signing?

item.title: A Close Call with an Expensive Mistake
item.description: A situation nearly turns costly, highlighting how small oversights can lead to major problems during a vehicle deal. What could have prevented the mistake?

item.description: Helpful advice on improving your chances of car loan approval, from credit preparation to budgeting. What factors matter most to lenders?
